backend/main.mo: Actor with access control for user profiles and an admin-restricted contact message viewer, plus a public contact form submission endpoint.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping product requirements to frontend files, components, and tests.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing prewritten summaries of all major frontend components and sections.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles defining OKLCH color variables, dark mode tokens, and global background/foreground rules.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component assembling all site sections with header, footer, and WhatsApp button.
frontend/src/components/ContactForm.tsx: Contact form component with validation and a React Query mutation that submits data to the backend.
frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx: Footer with company info, navigation links, contact details, social icons, and smooth-scroll handlers.
frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx: Responsive header with smooth-scroll navigation, mobile sheet menu, and scroll-based styling.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppFloating: Floating WhatsApp button that opens a prefilled chat message.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages backend actor instances based on Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity auth context, loading, login, and logout handling via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for submitting and retrieving contact form messages through the actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles with custom theme variables, utilities, and fonts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point configuring React Query and Internet Identity provider.
frontend/src/sections/AboutSection.tsx: About section with company description and stats grid.
frontend/src/sections/ConstructionSectio: Construction services section showing process steps and a call-to-action button.
frontend/src/sections/ContactSection.tsx: Contact section with contact details and a message form.
frontend/src/sections/HeroSection.tsx: Renders the hero section with background image, company highlights, and buttons that scroll to contact or properties sections or trigger a phone call.
Displays categorized property listings using tabs and cards, with details and a scroll-to-contact action.
frontend/src/sections/ServicesSection.ts: Shows a grid of service cards describing real estate and construction offerings, plus buttons to navigate to the contact section.
frontend/src/sections/TestimonialsSectio: Presents client testimonials in a grid of cards with avatars and quotes over a subtle background image.
frontend/src/sections/WhyChooseUsSection: Lists key reasons to choose the company using a grid of feature blocks with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, storing, retrieving, and clearing URL and session parameters, including hash-based query parsing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures TailwindCSS theme, colors, fonts, container settings, plugins, and custom animations for the frontend.
project_state.json: Defines the project’s state for building a real estate and construction website, including required images, features, navigation, CTAs, and content sections. Contains metadata, existing features, and no listed issues.
